response.overview: In a world where social media has replaced real connection, people begin vanishing without a trace from isolated places. Lonely teenager Pio, desperate to feel loved, encounters "Shubi," a mysterious creature born from her deepest emotions. When a local girl she once knew disappears into "Mobere"- a vast, cosmic realm where people are consumed by emotional imbalance - Pio follows Shubi into its dangerous depths, forcing her to confront her own loneliness and her fractured relationship with her mother.
response.title: Yomang
